ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the investment */,
  "invest" REAL /* Amount invested in millions */,
  "value" REAL /* Total value of the assets in millions */,
  "capital" REAL /* Capital in millions */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the firm */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., R&D, production, marketing) */,
  "investment_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the investment */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firms" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firm */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the firm */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the firm operates */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the firm's headquarters */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the firm was founded */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the firm in billions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year of the investment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  "economic_conditions" TEXT /* Economic conditions during the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the firm the report is generated for */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the report is generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Detailed data of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly, ad-hoc) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_report_year FOREIGN KEY ("report_year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)
